name: voxelforge-electron
description: VoxelForge Electron renderer — Three.js static mesh renderer
author: VoxelForge Contributors

scripts.build: tsc && esbuild src/renderer/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer/bundle.js --platform=browser --format=iife --external:none && esbuild src/mcp-viewer/main.ts --bundle --minify --legal-comments=none --outfile=../src/VoxelForge.Mcp/wwwroot/viewer-bundle.js --platform=browser --format=esm --external:none && node scripts/strip-trailing-whitespace.mjs ../src/VoxelForge.Mcp/wwwroot/viewer-bundle.js && cp src/renderer/renderer.html dist/renderer/renderer.html
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run check:build-assets
scripts.package:dir: npm run publish-sidecar && npm run build && electron-builder build --linux dir --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package: npm run publish-sidecar && npm run build && electron-builder build --linux --config electron-builder.yml
